mapper.select:
SELECT m_motocycle.moto_no , m_motocycle.moto_name , m_motocycle.seat_height , m_motocycle.cylinder , m_motocycle.cooling , m_motocycle.price , m_motocycle.comment , m_motocycle.brand_id , m_motocycle.version , m_motocycle.ins_dt , m_motocycle.upd_dt , m_brand.brand_name FROM m_motocycle LEFT OUTER JOIN m_brand ON m_motocycle.brand_id = m_brand.brand_id
WHERE m_motocycle.moto_no = #{motoNo} ORDER BY moto_no;
SELECT MAX(m_motocycle.moto_no) + 1 FROM m_motocycle FOR UPDATE
